title: New York Time Series Analysis Framework
description: A timeline illustrating the key stages of conducting a time series analysis on a dataset related to New York, from data sourcing to model deployment.
elements: Data Collection (NYC Open Data, MTA, Weather)
Data Cleaning & Preprocessing (Handling missing values, outliers)
relationships: Sequential flow from data sourcing through to deployment, with each stage building upon the results of the previous one to create an accurate predictive model.
